issue_title: [BUG] - Save/Save and continue editing buttons not working in edit mode
issue_body_preview:
### Description

While trying to modify field(s) in edit view of a document of a mongoDB collection, neither `Save` nor `Save and continue editing` buttons had any effect. It did nothing and launched nothing in background and logs.

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/4e160d85-2bff-4
test_description_zh: 在编辑模式下打开某条已有记录，修改其中一个或多个字段的值，然后分别点击「Save」和「Save and continue editing」按钮，观察按钮是否触发保存操作以及页面/数据是否正常响应。
expected_result_zh: 点击「Save」按钮后，修改的数据应成功保存并跳转回列表页面（或显示保存成功提示）；点击「Save and continue editing」按钮后，修改的数据应成功保存且停留在当前编辑页面，字段显示为最新保存的值，后台网络请求正常发出并返回成功响应。
